hero.headline: MUJ Online MBA in Information System Management: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved Super/Dual specialization. 12 spec subjects in Sem 3-4. NAAC A+, NIRF #58.

sections.tldr: MUJ Online MBA in Information System Management covers database management, software project management, ERP, business intelligence, IT infrastructure, and information security for IT professionals targeting management roles. NAAC A+, NIRF #58 at Rs 1,53,000 upfront (15% off) or Rs 1,80,000. Super/Dual spec — pair with Analytics or IT and FinTech. Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (70% off). Best for IT professionals targeting IT manager, project manager, or enterprise systems leadership roles.

about.body:
Information System Management is the MBA specialization for IT professionals who manage enterprise information systems: ERP administrators, software project managers, database managers, and IT operations executives who want to move into IT manager, systems director, or CIO roles. The MUJ Online MBA in ISM covers the business-technology interface: database management systems, ERP implementation and management, business intelligence and analytics, software project management, IT infrastructure, and information security.

MUJ's Super/Dual specialization is valuable for ISM students. Pairing Information System Management with Analytics and Data Science creates a business intelligence and data architecture profile. Pairing with IT and FinTech creates a technology-plus-financial-services credential for BFSI technology roles. Both combinations are in demand at large IT services companies and enterprise technology departments.

The Coursera Plus bundle at Rs 3,999 gives ISM students access to cloud computing, cybersecurity, and data engineering courses from Johns Hopkins, University of California Irvine, and Duke University — certifications that complement the MUJ ISM curriculum.

Manipal University Jaipur Online is NAAC A+ accredited with NIRF #58 University ranking for 2025. EdifyEdu verifies accreditation data independently and does not receive commission from MUJ. Full programme overview at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: IT strategy alignment with business strategy, technology investment decision frameworks, and digital transformation planning.

sem3Subjects.name: Term Paper
sem3Subjects.description: Independent research paper applying information systems theory to a real-world enterprise IT challenge.

sem3Subjects.name: Database Management Systems
sem3Subjects.description: Relational database design, SQL, data modelling, and database administration for enterprise applications.

sem3Subjects.name: Software Project Management
sem3Subjects.description: SDLC methodologies, project planning and estimation, risk management, and software delivery governance.

sem3Subjects.name: Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)
sem3Subjects.description: ERP system architecture, SAP and Oracle implementation frameworks, business process mapping, and go-live management.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Intelligence and Analytics
sem3Subjects.description: BI tools and architectures, data warehouse design, reporting strategy, and management dashboard development.

sem4Subjects.name: International Business Management
sem4Subjects.description: Global IT operations, offshore delivery models, and managing technology services across geographies.

sem4Subjects.name: Project
sem4Subjects.description: Major dissertation integrating information systems management learning into an original applied business study.

sem4Subjects.name: IT Infrastructure Management
sem4Subjects.description: Data centre operations, cloud infrastructure strategy, network management, and IT service continuity planning.

sem4Subjects.name: Information Security and Audit
sem4Subjects.description: Cybersecurity frameworks, ISMS implementation, ISO 27001, and IT audit methodology for enterprise systems.

sem4Subjects.name: E-Commerce
sem4Subjects.description: E-commerce business models, platform architecture, payment systems, and digital commerce strategy.

sem4Subjects.name: Web Designing and Content Management
sem4Subjects.description: Web development fundamentals, CMS platforms, UX principles, and digital presence management.

syllabus.note: Semester 1 and 2 subjects are shared across all MUJ Online MBA specializations. Full programme structure at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

whoHires.body:
Information System Management MBA graduates from Manipal University Jaipur Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** IT services, Enterprise software, BFSI technology, Manufacturing ERP, E-commerce

**Entry-level roles:** IT Project Coordinator, Systems Analyst, ERP Business Analyst, BI Analyst

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** IT Manager, ERP Project Manager, BI Manager, IT Infrastructure Manager, Systems Delivery Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** IT Director, Head of Enterprise Systems, VP Technology, CIO (mid-size company)

**Top hiring organisations:** TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL Technologies, SAP India, Oracle India, IBM India, Tech Mahindra, Persistent Systems

skills.body:
The Information System Management specialization builds skills that enterprise IT and technology employers test at manager and director levels:

**Technical skills:**
- ERP Management: SAP and Oracle implementation lifecycle, business process reengineering for ERP, change management for go-live, and post-implementation support governance
- Business Intelligence: data warehouse architecture, ETL pipeline management, BI tool administration, and management reporting design
- IT Infrastructure: data centre strategy, cloud migration planning, ITIL service management, and infrastructure cost optimisation
- Information Security: ISO 27001 implementation, risk assessment, vulnerability management, and IT audit process management

**Applied skills:**
- Software Project Delivery: agile and waterfall project governance, vendor management, and software quality assurance
- E-Commerce Operations: digital platform strategy, payment gateway integration, and online store performance management

**Soft skills:** Presenting IT strategy and roadmaps to non-technical boards, managing cross-functional teams during ERP rollouts, bridging the communication gap between business stakeholders and technology teams.

comparisons.body:
Comparing MUJ Online MBA Information System Management against peers:

**vs Amity Online MBA Information Technology Management:** Amity is NAAC A+ and NIRF #22 at Rs 2,25,000. Amity IT Management covers cybersecurity, data privacy, and agile programme management in depth. MUJ ISM covers ERP, database management, e-commerce, and web management — a more systems administration-oriented profile. For candidates managing enterprise systems (SAP, Oracle, databases), MUJ ISM is more targeted. For candidates managing IT governance and compliance, Amity IT Management is stronger.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA IT Management:** NMIMS is NAAC A++ and NIRF Management #24 at Rs 1,96,000-2,20,000. NMIMS IT Management focuses on cybersecurity, data governance, and agile delivery. MUJ's ISM covers ERP and e-commerce which NMIMS IT Management does not. For SAP and Oracle career tracks, MUJ ISM is more relevant. NMIMS brand is stronger overall.

**vs LPU Online MBA IT Management:** LPU is NAAC A++ at competitive fees. LPU's IT-oriented MBA spec covers software development and systems management. MUJ's Super/Dual spec flexibility and Coursera Plus are advantages. Manipal brand is recognised by large IT services companies that recruit from Manipal campuses nationally.

fees.body:
The total program fee for the Manipal University Jaipur Online MBA in Information System Management can be paid through 2 options:

**Option 1 — Semester-wise payment**: Rs 45,000 per semester, Rs 1,80,000 total across 4 semesters
**Option 2 — Full upfront payment (discounted)**: Rs 1,53,000 one-time (Rs 1,80,000 standard less 15 percent fee concession)

A one-time registration fee of Rs 500 applies at enrolment. MUJ does not charge separate exam fees per attempt, project evaluation fees, or admission processing fees beyond this.

For working professionals, MUJ offers a 24-month zero-cost EMI plan at approximately Rs 7,500 per month on the standard fee (Rs 6,375 per month on the discounted fee) through its NBFC lending partners.

**Scholarships available** (non-stackable — pick one based on eligibility):
- **Divyaang** (persons with disabilities): 20% discount with Divyaang certificate
- **Defence personnel**: 20% discount with Service/IC number
- **Manipal University Jaipur alumni** (UG or PG): 20% discount
- **Government employees**: 10% discount with Govt ID
- **Merit scholarship**: 10% discount for 80%+ marks in 10+2 or bachelor's

**Coursera Plus bundled access** (MUJ differentiator): Enrolled MUJ students get Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (standard Rs 13,999 — a 70 percent discount). This includes 10,000+ courses from University of Virginia, University of Michigan, Johns Hopkins, University of California Irvine, and other top global universities.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees and scholarships with Manipal University Jaipur each quarter. Please reconfirm current offers and eligibility with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The Manipal University Jaipur degree certificate carries the Manipal University Jaipur name, the MBA designation, and identifies the online learning mode per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The Information System Management specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode identification on the certificate is standard for UGC-DEB approved programmes and equivalent in recognition to regular MBA degrees for employment, promotions, and further studies.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from MUJ Online MBA Information System Management alumni. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Vikram Reddy
items.liked: ERP and business intelligence content was directly applicable to my SAP functional analyst role at a manufacturing company
items.disliked: Cloud computing and DevOps content was absent — increasingly central to IT infrastructure roles
items.body: I manage SAP implementations at a mid-size manufacturer. The ERP subject covered implementation methodology and business process mapping at a depth I had not encountered in vendor training. The BI and analytics content gave me frameworks for building management dashboards. Paired ISM with Analytics and Data Science — together they gave me a strong ERP-plus-data credential. The Manipal brand was immediately recognised by TCS and Infosys recruiters.

items.name: Pooja Gupta
items.liked: Information security and audit content covered ISO 27001 implementation — directly useful for my IT audit role
items.disliked: Proctoring software caused laptop performance issues during exams. Required clearing cache and restarting multiple times
items.body: I work in IT audit and compliance. The information security, ISMS, and IT audit methodology content was substantive. I used the ISO 27001 implementation framework from this subject in an actual client audit. The Coursera Plus access gave me cybersecurity courses from Johns Hopkins. The MUJ degree was accepted for my IT Audit Manager promotion with no issues from HR.

items.name: Suresh Menon
items.liked: Software project management content was practical and aligned with industry SDLC approaches
items.disliked: Career services did not have connections with IT companies in Kerala or Bangalore where I was looking. Job board had very few IT-specific postings
items.body: Content quality was good across most subjects. Software project management and ERP were the strongest. My frustration is the placement gap — campus students at Manipal Jaipur have placement support that online students don't get. For IT roles, the Manipal brand opens doors at TCS, Infosys, and HCL but converting those opportunities required my own effort. Don't join expecting structured IT sector placement assistance.

faqs.question: Can I choose dual specialization with the MUJ Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes. MUJ's Super/Dual specialization model lets you choose 2 specs at no extra cost. For Information System Management, effective pairings include: ISM plus Analytics and Data Science (for BI and data engineering careers), ISM plus IT and FinTech (for BFSI technology roles), or ISM plus Operations Management (for ERP in manufacturing). Both specializations are recorded on your marksheet.

faqs.question: Is Coursera Plus access included or charged separately?
faqs.answer: Coursera Plus is separately available to MUJ students at Rs 3,999 per year (standard Rs 13,999 — 70% off). For ISM students, useful Coursera offerings include Google IT Support, IBM Data Engineering, and cloud certification prep courses from Johns Hopkins and University of California San Diego. The Rs 3,999 access makes this a highly cost-effective supplement to the MBA.

faqs.question: What scholarships are available for the MUJ Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Five categories: 20% discount for Divyaang individuals, 20% for Defence personnel, 20% for MUJ alumni, 10% for Government employees, and 10% merit scholarship (80%+ marks in 10+2 or bachelor's). Non-stackable. Plus: paying the full fee upfront gets a 15% fee concession — reducing total from Rs 1,80,000 to Rs 1,53,000.

faqs.question: What salary can Information System Management MBA graduates expect?
faqs.answer: IT managers and systems delivery managers with 5-8 years of experience and this MBA earn Rs 12-22 lakh at IT services and enterprise software companies. ERP project managers and BI managers earn Rs 14-25 lakh. IT directors and CIO roles at mid-size companies pay Rs 25-50 lakh. Outcomes depend on company size, domain (SAP vs Oracle vs cloud), and city.

faqs.question: Is this MBA relevant for non-IT professionals who manage IT departments?
faqs.answer: Yes. The MBA foundation (Sem 1-2) and the ISM spec subjects are designed to be accessible to professionals managing IT without deep technical backgrounds — finance managers who own ERP systems, operations managers who supervise IT infrastructure, and HR managers overseeing HRIS platforms. The focus is IT management and business alignment rather than programming or deep technical skills.

chooseIf: You manage ERP systems, enterprise databases, or IT infrastructure and need a NAAC A+ management credential covering systems administration and business intelligence under Rs 1.8 lakh.
You want to pair ISM with Analytics and Data Science or IT and FinTech as a dual credential for data engineering or BFSI technology roles.
You value Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 for supplementing your MBA with cloud computing and cybersecurity certifications from global universities.
consider: You are targeting IT governance and compliance roles specifically — NMIMS IT Management or Amity IT Management covers GDPR, DPDP, and agile governance in more depth than MUJ ISM.
You need a credential specifically for cybersecurity careers — supplement any MBA with CISSP or CEH certification for roles that require certified security expertise.
You need active IT sector placement support — MUJ online career services are limited for IT roles and you will need to drive your own job search.
